title: Player Boat Leash
description: Move players riding boats around with leashes!
body:
# Player Boat Leash
Normally, players in boats will not budge when leashed. This mod, well, fixes that.

**Player Boat Leash** is very lightweight and has no dependencies. Works as a **server-side only** mod, or in singleplayer.

---

![A Happy Ghast hot air balloon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e0ad83c5d35ad7e6bd8b2c896d89366de9e8dc35_0.webp)

---

## Ideas
- Happy Ghast Hot Air Balloons (You can stack boats with leashes too!)
- Boat Trains
- Sleighs

---

![A boat train](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb980fdee2e2328b1befe613449bf94fb80cb792.jpeg)

---

## Notes
Credit in the form of a link would appreciated but is not required.
